zh.lifeSummary: 當Petronella Brokesby於1415年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷時，她的父親William Brokesby39歲，母親Joan Alderwick36歲。她於1438年與Thomas Berkeley在英國萊希斯特斯爾維蒙達哈姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1488年9月15日在英國萊希斯特斯爾維蒙達哈姆享年73歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾維蒙達哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Petronella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Fedele, Francesco, Marco, Salvatore, Vito.
Italian (southern): from Petronella, a feminine pet form of Petrone or Petronio .

variants.name: Petrone
meanings: From Latin Petronilla, originally a feminine diminutive of the Roman family name Petronius (of uncertain derivation). The name Petronilla was borne by a 1st-century martyr, and early in the Christian era came to be connected with Peter , so that in many legends surrounding her she is described as a companion or even the daughter of St Peter .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Petronella Brokesby was born in 1415, in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, her father, William Brokesby, was 39 and her mother, Joan Alderwick, was 36. She married Thomas Berkeley in 1438, in Wymondham, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 15 September 1488, in Wymondham, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 73, and was buried in Wymondham, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Petronella Brokesby est née en 1415, à Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, William Brokesby, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Joan Alderwick, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Berkeley en 1438, à Wymondham, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 septembre 1488, à Wymondham, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à Wymondham, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Petronella Brokesby 1415 in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Brokesby 39 und ihre Mutter Joan Alderwick 36. Sie hat 1438 in Wymondham, Leicestershire, England Thomas Berkeley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. September 1488 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Wymondham, Leicestershire, England und wurde in Wymondham, Leicestershire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Petronella Brokesbyが1415年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアメルトン モウブレイで生まれた時，父William Brokesbyは39歳，母Joan Alderwickは36歳であった。1438年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアウイモンドハムでThomas Berkeleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1488年9月15日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアウイモンドハムで73歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアウイモンドハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Petronella Brokesby(이)가 1415년 영국 레이스스터실르 멜턴 모우브라이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Brokesby(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Alderwick(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1438년 영국 레이스스터실르 윈이몽함에서 Thomas Berkeley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1488년 9월 15일 영국 레이스스터실르 윈이몽함에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 윈이몽함에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Petronella Brokesby родилась в 1415 г. в местности мелтон мавбрэи, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Brokesby было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Alderwick, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Berkeley в 1438 г. в местности вимондхам, лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 15 сентября 1488 г. в местности вимондхам, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности вимондхам, лисестиршир, Англия.
